meta.title: Eastern Orthodox Critics: My Question For You
meta.author: Gavin Ortlund

questions.question: What is the central question Ortlund poses to Eastern Orthodox critics in this video?
options: Whether the filioque is historically Latin or Greek
If the historic exclusionary rhetoric is not clear enough, what language would be stronger or clearer?
Which patriarchate should lead reunion talks
How to translate Theophan the Recluse into English
questions.answer: If the historic exclusionary rhetoric is not clear enough, what language would be stronger or clearer?

questions.question: In Ortlund's summary of historic Eastern Orthodox polemic, what does he say the filioque is treated as?
options: Heresy that places one outside the canonical Church
A doctrine accepted by all Eastern patriarchs in 1848
Identical to the Nicene Creed without qualification
questions.answer: Heresy that places one outside the canonical Church

questions.question: Which biblical image does Ortlund say is used to describe the Church and salvation boundaries?
options: Noah's ark—you are on the ark or in the flood
questions.answer: Noah's ark—you are on the ark or in the flood

questions.question: St. Paisius Velichkovsky's discussion in the video focuses especially on which group?
options: Uniate churches—Eastern liturgy but in communion with Rome
The Church of the East in Persia
Lutheran princes in the Holy Roman Empire
questions.answer: Uniate churches—Eastern liturgy but in communion with Rome

questions.question: According to Ortlund, Velichkovsky calls the filioque what?
options: The most important of all heresies
A teaching only about church architecture
questions.answer: The most important of all heresies

questions.question: The 1672 Synod of Jerusalem is associated in the video with which document or figure?
Ortlund compares the significance of the 1672 Jerusalem synod for Eastern Orthodoxy to what Catholic milestone?
What historical context does Ortlund give for the tone of the 1672 synod toward Protestant-like ideas?
options: A patriarch of Constantinople with Protestant-leaning and even seemingly Calvinist leanings
The Crusader sack of Constantinople in 1204
questions.answer: A patriarch of Constantinople with Protestant-leaning and even seemingly Calvinist leanings

questions.question: In the quoted logic of the Confession of Dositheus, what does Ortlund say 'Catholic Church' means?
options: The Roman Catholic Church under the pope
The Eastern Orthodox Church describing itself as catholic
questions.answer: The Eastern Orthodox Church describing itself as catholic

questions.question: Which phrase from the 1672 material does Ortlund highlight regarding Protestant heretics who forsake the Church?
options: They are forsaken by the Holy Spirit
They are invisible members of the ark
questions.answer: They are forsaken by the Holy Spirit

questions.question: The patriarchal encyclical of 1895 is described as an official Eastern Orthodox response to which pope?
What salvation-related wording does Ortlund emphasize from the 1895 encyclical?
options: Salvation is impossible for anyone baptized
It is necessary to return to the ancient doctrines of the Church to attain salvation in Christ
Western Christians need no return because they share the same creed
Salvation is purely a future judgment with no present dimension
questions.answer: It is necessary to return to the ancient doctrines of the Church to attain salvation in Christ

questions.question: St. Philaret in the video is identified as what?
Philaret's Longer Catechism is cited for which claim about Christ's salvation?
options: To share in Christ's salvation one must necessarily be a member of his body, the (Orthodox) Catholic Church
The Church is invisible and therefore membership cannot be spoken of
questions.answer: To share in Christ's salvation one must necessarily be a member of his body, the (Orthodox) Catholic Church

questions.question: The 1848 encyclical of the Eastern Patriarchs responds in context to which pope's earlier epistle?
In the 1848 document, Ortlund says the filioque is placed in the same kind of category as what ancient heresy?
Which Psalm does Ortlund mention in connection with being clothed with a curse in the 1848 encyclical?
Ortlund cites which Pauline passage alongside conciliar anathemas as part of the 1848 rhetoric?
To rebut the charge of mere emotional appeal, which Pauline passage does Ortlund cite as a model of appropriate grief for the lost?
Ortlund says his substantive argument about spiritual fruit draws especially on which Gospel discourse about a kingdom divided against itself?
When critics say his argument opens the door to Mormons, Muslims, and Buddhists being saved, how does Ortlund respond regarding Mark 9?
options: He agrees all religions save equally
The exorcist in view is a Christian acting in Jesus's name—not indiscriminate pluralism
He denies Mark 9 exists in the canon
He says only Orthodox priests may cast out demons
questions.answer: The exorcist in view is a Christian acting in Jesus's name—not indiscriminate pluralism

questions.question: Which book of his does Ortlund reference for the kingdom/fruit line of argument?
options: What It Means to Be Protestant
questions.answer: What It Means to Be Protestant

questions.question: For assurance of salvation, which Johannine verse does Ortlund quote about hearing Christ's word and passing from death to life?
Which Romans passage does he cite about the Spirit bearing witness with our spirit?
Roughly what centuries does Ortlund claim as the span in which the pattern of maximal exclusionary rhetoric appears in the sources he surveys?
